title: EquinoxxMC
description: The official pack of the EquinoxxMC minecraft server!
body:
# The Official modpack of EquinoxxMC
EquinoxxMC is a modded multiplayer server that offers a rich blend of automation, culinary, and quality-of-life enhancements to expand and improve Minecraft.

The pack focuses around the Create mod and its add-ons to provide opportunities to make more complex machinery and automated systems. Farmer's Delight also expands on culinary aspects with new crops, cooking implements, and food items.

## Key Features:
**Automation and Engineering:**
- Create mod and its expansions (e.g., Create Big Cannons, Create Diesel Generators, Create Ore Excavation)
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod for advanced item management

**Culinary Enhancements:**
- Farmer's Delight for an enriched farming and cooking experience1
- Create: Food and Create: Slice & Dice for additional food-related content1

**World Improvement:**

- YUNG's Better End Island and Better Nether Fortresses for enhanced structure generation1
- Towns and Towers for more diverse world structures1

**Performance Optimization:**
- Sodium, Lithium, and Iris for improved game performance and graphics.
- Mod Menu for easy mod configuration

**Quality of Life:**
- Xaero's Minimap and World Map for navigation
- Mouse Tweaks and Inventory Management for smoother gameplay
- Simple Voice Chat for in-game communication

_This pack can also be run in single player for an improved survival experience._

Old versions from EquinoxxMC 1.x can be found in our [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/B7kCdD3AxT).
